ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  "initial_listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was initially listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "ipo_price" TEXT /* IPO price of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "trading_range" TEXT /* Trading range of the stock */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Price change of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "total_return" TEXT /* Total return of the stock over the period */,
  "annualized_return" TEXT /* Annualized return of the stock */,
  "volatility" TEXT /* Volatility of the stock over the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" TEXT /* Sharpe ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the financial data */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income of the company */,
  "dividends_per_share" TEXT /* Dividends per share */,
  "ebitda" TEXT /* EBITDA of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst */,
  "target_price" TEXT /* Target price of the stock */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "price_target_change" TEXT /* Change in price target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the analyst */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was delisted from the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "exchange_id")
)
